description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Build that runs on push and pull request events. The workflow should have three jobs: buildUbuntu, buildOSX, and buildWindows, each running on a different environment (ubuntu-latest, macOS-latest, and windows-latest respectively). For each job, checkout the repository and run a series of make commands to build and install libraries from Bill Gray's GitHub repositories (lunar, sat_code, jpl_eph) with platform-specific compilation flags.
